titleStmt.title: SII 30.172: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 172. (A.R. No. 250 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīsvara temple-on the south wall Rājādhirāja-Chōḻa I: year 3[1]: 104[9] A.D.

summary.p: Built in at the left. It registers the sale of land which was freed from taxes to the temple by the ūrār for feeding Śrī māhēsvaras, who come to worship during the days of festivals in the temple of Sri Pōndaiuḍaiya Mahādēva of Parākramasōḻachchaturvēdimaṅgalam of Dāmar-nāḍu in Dāmark-kōṭṭam, a sub division of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻamaṇḍalam.
It refers to the temple of Sōḻakēraḷa-Viṇṇagar Āḻvār, while stating the boundaries of the land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷertaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik kiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaṭpuṇara ceṅkolocci karuṅkalikaṭintu taṉ ciṟiya tātaiyu n=tiruttamaiyanuṅ kuṟikoḷ ta
ṉṉiḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum neṟiyuṇar tantirupputalvaraiyu n=taṉṟeḻil vānavaṉ vallavan minavan kaṅkaṉilaṅkaiyaṟkiṟaivaṉ pulaṅkaḻaṟ pallavaṉ kaṉṉakucci
yarkkāvalaṉṉeṉap poṉṉaṇiccuṭar maṇimakuṭam cūṭṭip paṭar pukaḻāṅkavaṟkavar nāṭaruḷip pāṅkaṟu mātātai muṉvan=ta potalar teriyal vikkirama nāraṇaṉ cakkaraṉ
ru maṇimauli vāḻiyar pūventracoḻaṉeṉap puṉantu maṉṉupal Ūḻiyiṟṟeṉṉavar mūvaruḷ māṉāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭi Āṉāp parumaṇip pacuntalai porukaḷattarintu Aḷa
yiṟ piṭittu taṉatti vāraṇak kaḷiṟṟālutaippittaruḷi Antamil perumpukaḻ cuntara pāṇṭiyaṉ koṟ(ṟ)ai veṇkuṭaiyum kaṟṟai veṇkavariyum ciṅkātaṉamu
Iḻintu taṉmuṭiviḻat talaivirittoṭi tollai mullaiyūr turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭairaicai ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻirāmakeṭa mūvarkeṭa muṉintu viṭal keḻu
k koṇṭu taṉṉāṭuviṭṭoṭi kāṭupukkoḷippa vañciyap putumalar malaintāṅku Eñcalil velaikeḻu kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuppittāhava mallaṉumañca Avaṉṟāṅkarum
puḷ kaṇṭappayyaṉuṅ kaṅkātaraṉum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiya tiṇṭiṟal viṭutar vikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum tarumuraṭcāṅkamayyaṉum mutaliṉar camarabhiruvottuṭaiya nimir
Ayṅkarippuraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉṉāṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭu Oṉṉār koḷḷippākkai Oḷḷeri maṭuppittorutaṉit taṇṭāṟ porukaṭalilaṅkaiyarkomāṉ vikkirama pākuviṉ makuṭamum muṉ
ṉi Uḷaṅkoḷ nāṭu taṉṉuṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅkumuṭi kavitta viracilāmekaṟ porukkaḷattañcittār kaḷiṟiḻintu kavvaiyuṟṟoṭik kātaliyoṭun
mukkariya Āṅkariya Āṅkavamāṉa nīṅkutaṟkāka mīṭṭuva vāṭṭoḻil purintu veṅkaḷattulan=ta ciṅkaḷattaraicaṉ poṉṉaṇi cuṭarmaṇi muṭiyum (kanṉaraṉ) kaṉṉaraṉ vaḻivan
rājaṉ velloḷit taṭamaṇi muṭiyuṅ koṇṭu vaṭapulattu Irukālāvatum porupaṭai naṭātti kaṇṭaraṉ tiṉakaraṉ nāraṇaṉ kaṇavati vaṇṭalar teriyal maticūtaṉaṉeṉṟe
pukaḷāram pūṇṭu kaṭakamana ttāṉāyil mūṉṟāma mayaiṉumeṉṟetir viḷakiṉveṟṟum pakaṟ numpiya parumpi ciṅkaḷar An=ta
koṇṭarācaṉum kuṟicilai mu yaṉum taṇṭa nāyaka rāttaḷa Iṟāyaṉum vityappayiṉum vīra māṇikkaṉumaṉaip piṭaii coḷan=tarar main=ta
kaṉumātāvum Eṉum vāḻtaliyāpuṉaikaḻal ceracceruṭeṉai por makaḷi totu vaṇṇanappiṭittu Eḻarai yilakkamum pukaḻpaṭac ciṉavipuṇ [cīṟappa viṉiyapo]
yivataittu ciṇarun=tappayappālarupāḷiṇaṅ muraṇayiṟppa Aṅkava karavaiyaṉāka kaḻaiñcu poṉ 4 10teya muṉnāṭṭu vettiyalirai villavar mīṉavaraṭai
nturar Aiyyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar An=tirar mutaliyar Araicariṭu tiṟaikaḷumāṟi loṉṟu Avaṉiyuḷ kūṟu koḷ poruḷkaḷum Ukantu nāṉmaṟaiyavar mukantukoḷak kuṭuttu vi
ṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉeṉṟuyarn=ta perumpukaṭ kovirāja kecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 31 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭala tāma
ṟkoṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻac caturvveti maṅkalattu śrīpontaiyuṭaiya mahātevar tiruviḻā cevikka van=ta Aṭiyār śrīmāyeśvararkku Amutu ceytaruḷa nāṟpat
pakkal yāṅkaḷ koṇṭa po Ippo kaḻañcuṅ koṇṭa paricāvatu nāraṇakuṭṭi ceṟuvuṅkuṇṭil
kkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai paḷḷavāk kālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ivvūr coḻakeraḷaviṇṇakar Āḻvār pūmikkum Eripaṭṭikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
teṟkum Iṉṉāṟpālkellai naṭuvupaṭṭaṉilam paḻaṅkol patinaṟu cāṇkolāl kuḻi Āyiramum Ippon patinkaḻañcum koṇṭu Ipponnukku viruttiyāl
ponta kuṭimai Epperpaṭṭitum nāṅkaḷeyiruntu Iṉṉilam Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Iṉnilañcuṭṭi(r) nirvilai Antarāyam Uḻaviṟai
nilattukku kaṭainir talainir pāccikoḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Ipparicu Icai viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ātidāsa caṇṭeśvaranukku muṟcollappaṭṭa Uḷ
Aṟiveṉ ṉeripoṉṉaneṉivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ mallaṉ kāṉappiriyaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ can=tiraneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟive
vaṉ kucenneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirupporiciṟṟiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cimātavaṉ comaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cāttaṉ kampaneṉ Ippa
Digital edition of SII 30.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
